ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the exchange rate */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "base_currency_id" INTEGER /* Base currency ID */,
  "quote_currency_id" INTEGER /* Quote currency ID */,
  "rate" REAL /* Exchange rate value */,
  "changes" REAL /* Change in exchange rate value */,
  "changes_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in exchange rate value */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the exchange rate data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the exchange rate was recorded */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the trade or the amount of the base currency traded */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source of the exchange rate data */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the exchange rate data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_base_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_quote_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency */,
  "decimal_places" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places to which the currency is typically quoted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the logo of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the currency's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, trader) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "base_currency_id" INTEGER /* Base currency ID */,
  "quote_currency_id" INTEGER /* Quote currency ID */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "notify_above" INTEGER /* Whether to notify when the exchange rate is above the threshold */,
  "notify_below" INTEGER /* Whether to notify when the exchange rate is below the threshold */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was created */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the alert is currently active */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_quote_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_base_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the API key */,
  "key" TEXT /* The API key */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the API key was created */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the API key was used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the API key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "base_currency_id" INTEGER /* Base currency ID */,
  "quote_currency_id" INTEGER /* Quote currency ID */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trend was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_base_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_quote_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)
